I wonder if WD40 would work!?!?

Title: Trend Lab Window Valance
Text: It's too bad that I was unable to find a valance locally, but this valance looked cute and works very well in my kitchen. I needed 2 (have 2 windows), but Amazon only had one, so I went to =Overstock and paid more for the 2nd one but it's worth it. They are a nice valance that is cotton and once ironed looks great! I only wish Amazon would quit sending me suggestions for a baby's room since this is under a baby company that produced it.Very happy with this valance and would buy it again. Cute design :0)Disappointed with Amazon's turn around time before it was even shipped. Once shipped it was as expected.

Title: Betty Lou's Peanut Butter Balls, 1.7-Ounce Balls, 40-Count Jar
Text: I bought these to have as a snack (or even a meal) when I am working. I love the taste and texture. Kind of hard to eat while drving (but who should be doing that anyway). I find they really satisfy my hunger and keep my blood sugar up for hours till I can have a real meal. I am gluten intolerant and I love that these are gluten free. It is very hard to find tasty GF snacks. My husband has starting eating them too. Well worth the cost, considering you're getting a meal out of it. Much healthier than fast food and keeps me from having to even consider it. I like to have one in my purse at all times and I have found they don't melt, which is great. I would recommend these to anyone, I bet kids would really love them, since the peanut butter covers up the protein taste.

Title: Munch Nut Bar, 1.42-Ounce Bars (Pack of 36)
Text: Excellent source of peanuts without too much sugar. We share with friends, but rarely have leftovers. Closest candy to peanut brittle. Recommend highly.

Title: Betty Lou's Spirulina-Ginseng Balls,Nut Butter Gluten-Free 1.4-Ounce Balls, 40-Count Jar
Text: I love having one of this with me wherever I go in my busy daily life. A lot of times, it's hard to find a healthfood store around me, or find a snack bar in much more expensive price, often packed with sugar and unhealthy ingredients. This cute nut ball is compact in size and nutrient. It saves me time for shopping and satisfy me with its taste!

Title: Leonidas Belgian Chocolates
Text: These chocolates are such a great find! I was looking for a special type of hazelnut chocolate called gianduja. I searched for it and found this perfect selection! It is the smoothest, creamiest hazelnut chocolate I have found. A little on the pricey side but TOTALLY WORTH IT! People I know who aren't that crazy about chocolate or hazelnut chocolate specifically have LOVED it and wanted more! I bought some during the Christmas season and shared it (out of holiday spirit) but kind of wish I had saved more for myself!

Title: Optimum Nutrition 100% Whey Gold Standard
Text: I got the strawberry flavor. It is uber tasty, and mixes well. My suggestion:8oz Soy milk, or waterhandful of blueberries, and a small bit o ice..awesome shake for anytime.

Title: Enzymatic Therapy Fatigued to Fantastic Energy Enfusion & Energy B Complex, 19 oz and 30 caps
Text: This is the best product on the market in my book. Husband & I started using it and both have noticed a huge increase in energy. Plus with the added boost, together we have lost over 70 pounds!!! We are ordering our third shipment and continue to recommend this line of products to family and friends. Each of the powders taste great. The berry is best in Milk.. yummy!Thank you Dr. Teitelbaum or getting a product that really works out on the market.Tim & Deb HansonMemphis, TN

Title: Ultima Replenisher, Orange, 90-Serving Canister
Text: Having been plagued by nightly leg cramps, I've tried everything including a ghastly mixture of vinegar and garlic. (Yes, it worked, but I'd rather have the cramps !) Asking my trainer about this, he advised a drink that replaced electrolytes. Surfing here, I found this drink, with excellent reviews. It tasted great and the cramps disappeared ! There is a reviewer who bemoans the fact that it contains a minuscule amount of aspartame. My thought on this is that (see above title) No More Cramps is more important that the tiny amount of aspartame. Compare to the amount of sweetener in Gatorade !

Title: Larabar Fruit and Nut Food Bar, 1.7-Ounce Bars (Pack of 16)
Text: Great on the go snacks. Cinnamon Roll is my favorite. Cherry pie is also delicious. They're all "good". You can't go wrong with this whole foods, raw bar :)

Title: Optimum Nutrition 100% Whey Gold Standard
Text: I tried a free sample of this flavor that was included in my order. It was the most miserable experience of my life.

Title: Source Naturals Spirulina Powder
Text: Suppresses appetite, enables improved weight loss.Source Naturals Spirulina Powder, 16 ounceGives the feeling of more energy. Plug your nose, drink it down, and ENJOY the improvements in how you feel.

Title: Balance Bar Nutrition Energy Bar, 1.76-Ounce Bars (Pack of 15)
Text: I'm very sorry but I don't know of a nice way to say this

Title: Optimum Nutrition 100% Whey Gold Standard
Text: The product I received was exactly as ordered, and arrived earlier than expected! I am extremely satisfied with the product and it tastes great as well. I will definitely buy this product again!

Title: Optimum Nutrition 100% Whey Gold Standard
Text: This is the second protein shake I've tried since I started working out. My first was GNC Pro Performance 100% Whey Protein. ON Gold Standard is a lot better in my opinion because of the taste and it is absorbed faster. I used this for about 2 months and noticed more lean muscle. I recommend double rich chocolate. The next protein I'm trying is Isopure Low Carb.

Title: 100% All Natural Whey
Text: I originally bought this MRM Whey Protein at a health-food store. I especially like it because it's low in carbs and uses Stevia for a sweetener instead of the other more chemical alternatives. I usually buy the Rich Vanilla because it is so versatile. I add a lot of cinnamon (good for you!) and it tastes delicious, especially when I mix it with hemp milk. I've made it for my friends who only eat things based on good taste, and everyone has loved this product. When I ordered it from Amazon.com, I found that it was about half the price, and with my Amazon Prime free two-day shipping, it made it very economical and quick to receive. I plan to order ahead of time before I run out to be sure I always have this product on hand for our morning "shakes".

Title: SlimFast Shake Mix, 12.83-Ounce (Pack of 3)
Text: The only thing good I can say about this product is that it tastes good. That is true of the entire Slimfast line of products. They all taste good. But due to the high sugar content they are not weight loss products as the name of the product and company advertising suggests. The Optima line of Slimfast products reduces, but does not eliminate the volume of sugar. This is really stupid on the part of the Slimfast Company. They could have eliminated sugar all together and replaced it with Splenda. Then they would have actually had a weight loss product. But due to the low cost of sugar and the fact that most people prefer the taste of sugar, they chose to "reduce" the sugar content. The smart consumer will not buy this product, unless you have no need for weight loss, and don't mind buying a good tasting product from a company that misleads the public in their advertising.Since the main ingredient in all Slimfast products is sugar, their products have absolutely no weight-reducing characteristic. I tried the Slimfast products and program myself, so I know from my own experience that it does not work!The US Department of Agriculture did many studies to result in their well know "food guide pyramid." It states that "sweets should be used sparingly." Consuming meals of primarily sugar in 2 out of every 3 meals consumed (the widely published Slimfast diet plan), could not possibly be described as using sweets sparingly.The Nutrition Action Health letter website indicates

Title: Power Bar Protein Plus, Reduced Sugar, 2.47-Ounce Bars (Pack of 12)
Text: I love the Powerbar protein bars but was worried the reduced sugar version would be nasty. These were great. I'd routinely take one to work for breakfast. It's easy to eat while working without having to leave my work area or sit down. They taste great and I'm not hungry for hours after. Unfortunately, this flavor is hard to come by.

Title: Optimum Nutrition 100% Whey Gold Standard
Text: I bought this along with the chocolate one and both are great. The flavor is delicious. I don't even have to use a blender to make it. All I do is measure out a scoup of the powder and slowly stir in my liquid Nothing could be easier than that. I mix mine primarily with water. The flavor is so good you really don't need to mix with anything else unless you want to. I have though bought those strawberry/banana smoothie drinks you get in the produce section to vary up the vanilla. I use 1/2 cup of the smoothie and 1/2 cup water and it make for a yummy treat, great for a quick breakfast. I love getting that punch of protein without a lot of sugar. I think this product is high quality and have recommended it to my family and friends.

Title: EAS AdvantEdge 100% Whey Protein
Text: Very fine powdered chocolate whey. Tastes good enough but not enough chocolate flavor for me. Used this in the morning after my work out and mixed it in a blender. Mixed protein, 2 ice cubes, and a shot of milk and blend until smooth. This product had no chunks after blending and mixed nicely in a shaker.

Title: LABRADA NUTRITION Lean Body Meal Replacement Formula
Text: This is one of the best tasting vanilla shakes around. I'm so happy I tried this, its a nice change from the usual chocolate. I made this in the blender with water and ice, kinda thick so it would last awhile. Even my kids like this one and want their own milkshake when they see this come out of the cupboard!

Title: 100% Whey, Chocolate Mint 5 lb
Text: I have found this protein powder to be actually quite good tasting. Mixed with some milk, and put through a blender, it is almost as tasty as regular chocolate milk. I have also drank it with water, and it is not bad tasting that way either, although milk enhances the taste very much.I think it is best to use a blender to achieve the best results. No matter how much you mix it with a spoon, the powder will not blend with the milk as well as if you use a blender.As for its effectiveness, I can vouch for it. It is a good source of protein.I am on my second tub now, and I will continue buying more because it is just that good.

Title: Advantage Bar - Smores
Text: I've tried all of the Atkins bars, and many other lo carb bars. This is my favorite. Little bit of crunch, slightly sweet, not too dry.

Title: Atkins Advantage Bar Chocolate Peanut Butter
Text: This is probably the BEST Atkins bar out there, IMPO. The texture can be a bit crumbly, but the taste is PERFECT. I could not tell I was eating a low carb high protein bar at all.

Title: CytoSport Muscle Milk
Text: I was told muscle milk was a good product so i decided to try it out. I have to say i wouldnt buy it again. Im not sure how well the results are yet(only been taking it for about a week)but the vanilla flavor is extremely sweet, more than other protiens ive tried. Also it is very sandy, if you've taken powdered creatine before than you know what i mean. Best protein ive had is BSN "True Mass". Great taste and great results. (plus it doesnt give you gas lol)

Title: Met-Rx Big 100 Meal Replacement Bars 12 ea
Text: If you've lost all of your tastebuds in a freak accident, and have the chewing capacity of a bovine, you might enjoy this. Otherwise...I threw my 3/4 full box in the garbage, something I almost never do since I'm fairly tolerant of a wide range of food. But this stuff tasted so bad, and the consistency was so rock hard, that I wish Amazon allowed "minus stars". To call this food or a meal replacement is a joke.

Title: Grace's Best Sunflower Seed Cookies for Kansas
Text: Received my first package as a gift, and could not wait to share them with friends. I cannot say enough about the service provided by the seller, Sparkle Auto. Their exceptional attention to packaging these cookies for shipment guarantees they will arrive in "mint" condition!

Title: Mrs. May's Dry-Roasted Snack, Cashew Crunch, 2-Ounce Pouches (Pack of 24)
Text: Cashew Crunch is my favorite of Mrs. May's. I like the texture of the cashew. It's not as hard as the almond, which tends to get stuck in my teeth. I love the flavor, cashewy, sweet, and a little salty. Super tasty! I also like to portion size. It's just right. The packaging is easy to open, which I particularly value. The pouches fit easily in my purse for a great snack at work. I highly recommend this product.

Title: Mrs. May's Dry-Roasted Snack, Cashew Crunch, 2-Ounce Pouches (Pack of 24)
Text: Very good snack. Very tasty and fresh. Only disappointed is the size of one serving (one bag) is very small and I am a small person that usually gets filled up quickly.

Title: Hodgson Mill Milled Flax Seed, 12-Ounce Boxes (Pack of 8)
Text: I've been using this product (Hodgson Mill brand) for about 3 years. Smells good and never takes away from the taste of my foods. I first learned of flaxseed by reading an article about an African-American actor/physical trainer who swears by it. She stated she uses it every day, at least one tablespoon in her cereal and recommends it for everyone. This is some good stuff...and this company is wonderful.

Title: Grace's Best Sunflower Seed Cookies for Kansas
Text: I love these little cookies I discovered during a sampling at Whole Foods. While I can buy them locally, I appreciate being to send them to my elderly mother in California. She also loves these cookies and won't even share them!

Title: Wasabi Coated Peanuts, 2 Lb
Text: I should have ordered more -- my office mates discovered they were tasty and 'helped' me eat them!

Title: Rn Witmer Company, Inc. - Mess-Free Peanut Butter Mixer From R.N. Witmer Company
Text: If you use natural peanut butter, then this mixer is a must have! Initially, it takes awhile to get the peanut butter mixed but if you use it often it doesn't take as long in subsequent uses. The mixer definately cuts down on the mess of mixing peanut butter. The paddle really does come out clean!

Title: Emerald Nuts Wasabi Oven Roasted Peanuts, 16-Ounce Packages (Pack of 9)
Text: Such a disappointing flavor! Bitter, bitter, bitter. I am familiar with a variety of brands of wasabi peanuts and like all of them--except this one. And now I'm stuck with 9 pounds of bitter-tasting nuts. What a mistake.I have liked all the Diamond nut products I have tried in the past and am very surprised to find that this one must have been taste-tested by people with taste buds very different from my own. Even my husband--who is wonderfully easy to please--doesn't like these.

Title: Bob's Red Mill Whole, Dry Roasted Oregon Hazelnuts, 10-Ounce Packages (Pack of 6)
Text: These are very tasty and fresh hazel nuts. I think they are the best ones I have had. Its hard to find dry roasted hazel nuts without any other nuts and these are just great.

Title: Grace's Best Sunflower Seed Cookies for Kansas
Text: These little cookies are the best ever. Who can stop at just a handful. I found them at our local HY-Vee store in the organic section. We all know that sunflower seeds are important to our health, but to have them in such a decedant form is just well wonderful. Amazon is selling these cookies cheaper than in the stores so stock up and have fun with them. They never seem to last very long at my home.

Title: Rn Witmer Company, Inc. - Mess-Free Peanut Butter Mixer From R.N. Witmer Company
Text: The peanut butter mixer works well. Although it does take more time to get it thoroughly mixed than I thought it would. It sure beats cleaning the mess I made on the counter stirring it with a knife.

Title: Sensible Foods Organic Crunch Dried Snacks, Roasted Soynuts, 1.5-Ounce Pouches (Pack of 24)
Text: Sensible foods are a little pricey but the quality and healthiness are there. These individual snack packs are great when you're on the go. They are always fresh and tasty. I highly recommend them.

Title: Planters Deluxe Mixed Nuts - 40 oz. container - Value pack
Text: Great product, love the nuts, but the package does not contain 40 ounces of nuts. It clearly states on the label that it contains two pounds and .5 ounces. A pound is 16 ounces (or at least it used to be when I was in elementary school) which makes the total contents of the package 2 x 16 + .5 = 32.5 ounces.

Title: Sezme Sesame Snaps (36bars of 35g) over 2 pounds of Sesame Sezme
Text: That is how good they are. Simple, but oh so yummy.Growing up as a child in Oregon, my health conscientious parents allowed me no "candy" only these and raisins. So they have many years of great childhood memories attached to them.0% Cholesterol, 6 grams of protein in each package of 4 little wafers. Very good for Vegetarian diets.

Title: Rn Witmer Company, Inc. - Mess-Free Peanut Butter Mixer From R.N. Witmer Company
Text: I used to avoid using the last of my peanut butter just so I wouldn't have to stir up a new one, but now I no longer worry about peanut oil spilling everywhere. The rubber gasket keeps the mess inside and the hook stirs the PB up beautifully! Hurray for inventions!

Title: Thera-Band Single Pack Latex Exercise Bands - 5' x 5"
Text: I've bought a dozen of these Therabands over the years and they work great. I use them for shoulder and left knee PT.

Title: Neckpro Cervical Traction Device - Adjustable Door Bracket Model - Cervical Traction
Text: If I had to do this over, I would probably buy this product again.Pros

Title: PREPAK ECONOMY SHOULDER PULLEY - PP190
Text: This is exactly like the product I was using in Physical Therapy which I was delighted to find. I was surprised to see that shipping was just a little less that the total price of the product but this is the only negative I have to say about this. With continued use I hope to get my shoulder back to normal after a shoulder replacement.

Title: Medi-Dyne Pro Stretch
Text: My general opinion is you can use a step and get a very similar stretch. Recommend saving your money on this one.

Title: Tricep Rope
Text: High quality, essential equipment. Inconceivable that this won't last forever. Best way to isolate your triceps.

Title: Prostretch Flexibility Exercisers
Text: I used this at PT, and when my husbands podiatrist said he needed to stretch his calfs to help his plantar fasciitis, I thought of the pro stretch PT200. It works great for this!

Title: GHS Handmaster Plus Hand Exerciser
Text: The handmaster has done wonders for my wrists, I use it while watching TV every night for about 20 minutes. My wrists have been very sore up to now, with the handmaster, I have relief that I haven't had for years. Great product, Jim Hanson

Title: HomeSwimmer Portable Stationary Swimming System
Text: The device is good for what it does. It is priced right and we are happy with it. It has a few insignificant drawbacks in that it has to be anchored by a strap rather than a simple hole in the ground and the strap is annoying to have to step over. It performs well.

Title: Medi-Dyne Pro Stretch
Text: I bought this because I've always liked the stretch where you stand on a ledge and let your heels hang over. This device eliminates the need to find a ledge. However, you still need something to hold onto like the back of a chair, a wall, or in my case the dryer. I think the device is slightly overpriced but I don't regret buying it because you do get a great stretch of the calf and the achilles with this and like I said, it's convenient. I find that it's most effective and more comfortable to use when I have my shoes on.

Title: Cando Theraputty - 1 lb
Text: I was introduced to this product in physical therapy for a condition called "writer's cramp". It has helped to strengthen my hand with the result that I do not drop things as often and can open jars and lids in general more easily.

Title: Powerlung T343A Performer Series
Text: This product gave me a great thing, i use it everyday. And it also make me feel better.But when i got this, the seller didn't give me the washer as their advertise.So i feel i bit disappoint with the seller, but i still love this product anyway.Great !!

Title: Cando Hand Exercise Web (No Latex) - Large - 14"
Text: This is a really fun and effective hand exerciser. We all love to use it.Thanks.

Title: Rep Band - Exercise Bands - Latex Free - 6 Yards - 4" Width
Text: After 45 days the resistance band that's included with EA Sports Active for Wii broke. Athough EA Sports offers a $19.99 replacement it comes with parts I don't necessarily need. After putting thought to it I remembered that while in physical therapy I'd noticed that my therapist would cut bands from a roll and decided to check to see if I could find that item and did in the Amazon universe. This definitely 6 yard roll fits the bill and saves money which is one of my favorite pastimes. I was also able to increase the level of resistance and now I really feel the burn.EA Sports Active

Title: 5 in 1 - Neurological PINWHEEL, PERCUSSION HAMMER, TUNING FORK Combo
Text: Pros

Title: Cando Theraputty Hand Exercise Putty
Text: not only am I building fine motor skills but my sons doesnt find it work at all and actually enjoys the task.

Title: The Cuff Wrist/Ankle Exercise Weights - Color-coded - 20 sizes
Text: I purchased the 1/4 & 1/2 weight for my two year old who needs weight therapy for her upper body. This product is too big to fit around any part of her arms or wrists. Not a good product for small children. If you decided to buy be aware they are selling them as a single weight not as a set as you would buy most weights. And finally - with the 20% restocking fee and return freight - it's not worth it to send them back.

Title: Overdoor Shoulder Exercise Pulley Set
Text: What a great experience! Great product, superfast shipping. I told my therapist about it, he's very interested .,so I will pass your info on to him. thanks alot!! I would leave 6 stars if I could :)

Title: HomeSwimmer Portable Stationary Swimming System
Text: This product is a great concept superior to those that tether you just to your feet. I used this for almost a year now in my backyard swimming pool, so it has proved its usefulness.That said, in my experience the quality could be improved. The belt and both straps broke down after a few months of daily use. Customer service replaced one broken part, but there wasn't much more support after that unless I wanted to pay extra for replacements. Fortunately, it's easy enough to get your own makeshift parts. When the straps broke, I bought some cheapo lashing straps as replacement:Master Lock 3060DAT 12-Foot-by-1-Inch Lashing Strap, 2-Pack. Since the straps on the belt broke as well, I no longer can use the belt, so have resorted to using a standard belt used on jeans. The end result is that the product no longer resembles what I purchased, but looks more like a home-made contraption.The only things that have survived are the stretching spring and the pole, and theoretically, you can make a home-made version of this product after seeing how it works.Regardless, this product has allowed me to swim much better in a rather small pool, so I give it 4-stars for its usefulness as it's worth its cost as long as the parts don't break.As for the difference in exercise quality, I do find that the stationary nature of swimming in one place strains my arm muscles more than my legs because you're not gliding through the water. That would be the main difference between swimming in one place and swimming through the water, but this is still a great alternative to the constant turns that need to be made in a small swimming pool.

Title: The Cuff Wrist/Ankle Exercise Weights - Color-coded - 20 sizes
Text: I need a pediatric weight. This product is too bulky for a smaller child. I could not tell from the image that I was purchasing something that really wasn't going to work. The photo looked just like what was used by the OT.

Title: THERA-BAND 6ft Tan Extra Light Resistance Exercise Band Latex Bands
Text: I use it to rehab my weak ankles. Silver is perfect for athletes who regained full functionality in their ankles but needs rehab work to prevent future injuries. put the band around your foot and do sets of turning in, turning out, dorsi-flexing, plantar-flexing, in addition to your usual ankle routine. I've used it for 3 months, no problems so far

Title: GoodBye Odor for Ferrets/Small Animals, Gallon
Text: I have a cat, and I notice that when I come into my room -- where the litter box is -- there's no smell anymore.Also, my son breeds rat (yes he does!) and he noticed that once he started using this that the room didn't have the strong odor anymore. Before, it was hard to breathe in the room; after, you could hardly tell there were animals at all in there.

Title: Kraft Seven Seas Green Goddess Dressing, 16-Ounce Plastic Bottles (Pack of 6)
Text: For some reason Ive missed this in my life till this past summer when I had it at a restaurant. Needless to say I was hook and so was my son. Since then I have only been able to find it at a not so local Walmart. The other night I made a special trip to that not so local Walmart to pick up a few bottles and guess what, don't have it any more!! Why cant they just leave it in the stores if everyone loves it so much?????

Title: Salad Dressing
Text: Dip bold flavored vegetables and fruits like apples, celery, broccoli and cauliflower in the Blue Cheese dressing. You won't get anything out of it on milder flavored or watery vegetables like iceberg lettuce and tomatoes. Hope that helps.

Title: Kraft Light Three Cheese Ranch Reduced Fat Dressing, 16-Ounce Plastic Bottles (Pack of 6)
Text: Kraft's Three Cheese Ranch dressing is rich and creamy without the bite normally associated with regular ranch dressing. Unfortunately, this exceptional dressing is very difficult to find this in the stores, for some reason, which is why I have used Amazon to order. It's been a smooth process to place the order and receive my salad dressing.

Title: Hidden Valley Ranch Dressing Dry Mix, Original Buttermilk, 0.4-Ounce Packets (Pack of 24)
Text: Hidden Valley needs to remove this from their products. MSG is the 2nd ingredient in this, which means it contains a lot. MSG is poison and causes cancer. I will never buy another one of their products as long as they keep using this.

Title: Kraft Thousand Island with Bacon Dressing, 16-Ounce Plastic Bottles (Pack of 6)
Text: HiThis is the best salad dressing there is.It is also good in cold ham salad. With Kraft Miracle Whip in the salad it can't be beat

Title: Kraft Tangy Tomato Bacon Catalina Dressing & Marinade, 16-Ounce Plastic Bottles (Pack of 6)
Text: Fantastic. I have been searching for a store/distributor for months and months. I had almost given up, but that's when the magic happened. This flavor is discontinued by Kraft. Yes, I wrote them a letter and called them, but that's when I got the bad news. Later on, I was on Amazon.com and figured it couldn't hurt to try their site as well. Magic, I tell you, shear magic.ABrooks

Title: Newman's Own Salad Dressing, 3-Cheese Balsamic, 16-Ounce Bottles (Pack of 6)
Text: This is my favorite "Newman" dressing. This has more flavor than the ordinary balsamic dressing with only 10 additional calories a serving.

Title: Huy Fong - Sriracha Hot Chili Sauce 17 Oz.
Text: I put this on everything I eat, I use a 17 oz bottle about every 2 months, it is amazing on Ramen, Pizza, Burritos, chips, it has amazing flavor and just the right amount of burn.

Title: Good Seasons Salad Dressing & Recipe Mix, Asian Sesame, 1.2-Ounce Packets (Pack of 24)
Text: This is the only sesame salad dressing I've found that doesn't contain ginger. The flavor is great and, because it's made fresh, it doesn't have that plastic taste that some of the bottled dressings have.

Title: Salad Dressing
Text: I won't eat most light or fat free dressings because if you read the label, what they take out, they generally replace with sugar and sugar spikes my appetite big time and yet, a 1 TBS serving of my favorite regular Hidden Valley Ranch dressing doesn't even begin to cover my salad the way I'd like. I'd need at least 3 TBS to make it how I want and that's just too much fat for one meal. It's almost the RDA for an entire day so that's not really feasible for me.What to do??I was THRILLED to find this dressing at my local supermarket. I think it tastes "okay" right out of the bottle but to my tastebuds, it does leave something to be desired. To make it into something I look forward to eating, I do the following:Hidden Valley Ranch has such a strong flavor so I can take 1 TBS of it, 2 TBS of Walden Farms Ranch dressing and approximately 2 TBS of water. Mix well and I have enough dressing for a good sized salad - about 1.5 to 2 cups of greens and it tastes GOOD to me. I don't feel at all deprived and I'm getting fewer calories (there are 70 calories in 1 TBS of Hidden Valley Ranch dressing) and it's plenty thick for what I want it to do and that's cover the salad. I don't want it drenched exactly but I want that ranch flavor with every bite. I eat this dressing almost exclusively now on any kind of salad - turkey taco, chef, asian greens, etc.Sometimes I'll add 1 TBS of flaxseed oil to the mix to get the benefit of the omega 3's however, be aware that 1 TBS of flaxseed oil has approximately 120 calories in it so if you're watching calories then take that into consideration.The above recipe is also not a bad dip for veggies though it is somewhat thin in consistency. I like it best on salads.

Title: Salad Dressing
Text: I've tried a number of different flavors and found the Bleu Cheese and Vinaigrette more suited to my taste. Nothing I've tried of these dressings really tastes like normal salad dressing, but these make terrific alternatives if you're looking for a dressing that minimizes caloric intake. The Vinaigrette also has made a good "dipping" dressing for bread, etc. Just try a few and see which ones you like.

Title: Kraft Seven Seas Viva Italian Anything Dressing, 16-Ounce Bottles (Pack of 6)
Text: This is the worlds best Italian dressing. I use it for salads, marinate fresh vegetables in it and marinate sliced roast in it wich tenderizes the meat and makes it taste like a juicy steak. I love it but it is hard to find!! So Glad to find it while shopping on Amazon!!!

Title: Crest Whitestrips Dental Whitening System, 56 Strips
Text: First, this product really *does* whiten teeth--it's not a gimmick as some people think. (It uses a peroxide, which is probably how your dentist would do it, although this is a less concentrated form and takes two weeks.) Of course, it only whitens natural teeth, not dental work, but for most people, they should work.Now, on to the product itself. Some people have complained about them being difficult to apply, but after the first couple strips I didn't have any problems, and even the first time I applied it I didn't fold a strip or mess up anything major. Keep in mind that some tooth sensitivity is normal; personally, mine was only mild at worst and really only noticeable right after I applied a strip, but I know some people who aren't as lucky. If this is you, using a toothpaste for sensitive teeth may help. Also keep in mind that eating, drinking, and probably talking (unless you have better luck than I) are pretty much out of the question while you're wearing these, but I simply did one application on my drive home from work and another later in the night. My only concern was that the strips, especially the top ones, are a bit short and only cover your front eight or so teeth, but for most people that shouldn't be a problem.A year after my first use (teeth still looking good), I am currently using a generic brand--Equate, available from Wal-Mart for about $15, about $5 less than these--and have to say that I like Crest Whitestrips better because the strips are more flexible and easier to apply, and they stay in place better. The Equate ones have a bit harder plastic and tend to slide off my teeth if I open my mouth. Hardly worth it to save $5.It is also worth noting there are two other versions of Whitestrips

Title: Zila Rota Dent Rotadent Electric Toothbrush - BLUE
Text: My dentist said I needed this and charged me $155 which is more than I've seen elsewhere. I noticed in my last 2 visits that all of their patients seem to "need" this toothbrush as I heard them telling several around me on both occasions. The dentist office's name and number is also printed on the brush as well. I had just bought a sonicare which I thought was great and very effective after using an Oral B for many years, not to mention much cheaper and easier to use. Dentist's assist. said Sonicare isn't a good brush at all (Only because they don't sell and can't make money off of I'm sure). Does not seem very powerful. Have to plug in to charge instead of a base like most other rechargeables. My teeth didn't feel very clean at all compared to my other power toothbrushes. Went back to using my Sonicare. This brush just plain out sucks and is way overpriced. Even one of the Crest Spin brushes you can get for a few bucks does a better job than this one. Wouldn't recomend to my dog, let alone a perfect stranger.

Title: Marvis Aquatic Mint Toothpaste
Text: Not bad, i like it; however, it is kinda expensive.I kinda like the white regular Marvis more.

Title: POH Dental Floss Unwaxed 100 Yards - 12 Rolls Per Box
Text: This is the BEST dental floss! Not readily available in drug stores. If your dentist doesn't carry it, it is well worth buying online.

Title: Ultrasonex SU900 Brush & Flosser
Text: I had this product for over 6 months. It worked well when it did, but the tooth brush broke after regular wear and tear. I never used the flosser. I agree with the previous consumer review about the flosser being a waste of money. I don't recommend purchasing this product. Although, their customer service is extremely helpful, I encourage looking elsewhere for a electronic toothbrush. They hooked my up with a brand new replacement, but I don't think I'll use it. I'd sell it on Amazon, but I don't want to be cruel and lead someone else to buy this weak product.

Title: Waterpik Ultra Water Flosser
Text: I was totally surprised how well this product works. As it says, it only takes a minute to water floss my teeth after filling the little reservoir, which is also quite easy. Even after I have brushed and flossed, the water pick still removes some particles that were missed. When I am done, my mouth feels so clean, much like it does after a professional cleaning. It is an excellent product.

Title: Philips Sonicare Elite e9500 Custom Care Power Toothbrush
Text: This is my first electric toothbrush and I'm no spring chicken so I didn't know what to expect but the Sonicare 9500 is terrific.I like the timer and the 'break-in' feature which keeps those new to this type brush from overdoing it at first. It does a great job overall and my teeth have never been cleaner.Like some other reviewers have pointed out, the ridge between the head and the power unit tend to collect junk which needs to be cleaned periodically (I soak in hydrogen peroxide). Another reviewer has posted a like to a silicon cover for this area which supposedly corrects this but I haven't tried it.The brushes so far have lasted only about 3 months each but I can buy them in 3-packs at Sams for just over $30 so while not cheap, that is not prohibitively expensive either. The fact that the brushes needed to be replaced as frequently as they do is the only reason I give this 4 instead of 5 stars.

Title: Rembrandt Toothpaste, Intense Stain, Mint Flavor, 3-Ounce Tube
Text: This toothpaste leaves your teeth and overall mouth feeling very fresh and clean. I also noticed improved whiteness within 2-3 days, amazed even me. I highly recommend.

Title: Waterpik Ultra Water Flosser
Text: Excellent tool for oral health - should be used after flossing, brushing, and using rubber tip stimulator. Has multiple attachments (all concealed and stored in lid of water resevoir) for various purposes. Has greatly improved the condition of my gums and my teeth, less plaque at routine cleanings. Bought this to replace a 7 yr. old Water Pik - many very useful improvements.

Title: Waterpik Waterpik Power Flosser Fla-220
Text: Great turnaround time from Amazon!Article just what I wanted.Excellent servoceMahalo nui loe from Hawaii!

Title: Philips Sonicare E-Series Replacement Brush Head
Text: The Sonicare Elite is the best product to prevent gum disease.I've been using for 10 years and every visit to the dentist supportsthat this products is so worth it.

Title: REMBRANDT GENTLE WHITE, Mint Toothpaste, 3-Ounce
Text: After fighting with almost a constant stream of canker sores for years, I finally decided to put an end to them once and for all. I tried a number of different things from only drinking water, changing my diet, and using a variety of other products but nothing stopped my canker sores once and for all. I finally decided to give the Rembrandt Canker Sore toothpaste a try and while I wasn't thrilled with the lack of foam when I brushed, I was won over when my canker sores completely stopped. I was shocked -- and still am -- but this product received all of the five star ratings it's getting. It's amazing and has finally, after many years of suffering, given me relief from my canker sores. I'm able to eat and drink what I want, but just by changing toothpastes I was able to eliminate my canker sores altogether. If you're suffering at all from canker sores, you really owe it to yourself to at least give this a try.

Title: Waterpik Ultra Water Flosser
Text: I have been an avid 'flosser' for years, so after my old one quit working - I purchased this one 7 months ago. It worked great until about a month ago, when it started to leak out of its reservoir. I contacted the company hoping they would at least offer a replacement part...this was their response:Thank you for contacting Water Pik, Inc. customer service.We do not recommend leaving water in the reservoir between uses. Please drain the reservoir of any remaining water or solution after each use, which may be done by letting the flosser run for 7-10 seconds after using the product. This should prevent the unit from leaking while not in use.Sincerely,Katie M.Consumer ServicesService@waterpik.comYes, the reservoir does not leak if it's empty, but the whole reason for a reservoir is to hold water & I love the convenience of not having to fill it every time I use it.Sorry but this will be my last!!

Title: Oral-B EB17-3 Power Toothbrush Replacement Brush Heads (3 Adult Refills)
Text: EB17s usually run about $5 apiece in sets of 3, 4, or 6. This vendor's price for a set of three is superb.See my other reviews for more specifics on EB17 Flexisoft (normal adult) and extra-soft (soft adult, children) heads.

Title: Philips Sonicare Advance (A-Series) Replacement Brush Head
Text: You did not make clearThat the heads came in compact and regular sizes . I recieved the compact size and am very unhappy with them!!!!!!!!!!!!!!I am a full grown adult male.

Title: Oral-B Complete Deep Clean Ultra Floss mint floss(pack of 6)
Text: I've been lucky all my life. So maybe it's just me but I suspect Amazon has gotten the message. I will admit the reports of incomplete orders made me pause. I went ahead knowing I'd been warned. I was a bit relieved when the six-pack came through as ordered. As for the floss, I know there isn't anything out there to compete and I too am losing my suppliers.

Title: Oral-B Professional Floss Action Replacement Brush Head 3 Count
Text: So, Amazon offers the bets pricing available and send the product right to your doorstep. Why not? I love online shopping, they make my life so much easier. these brush heads came in perfect condition and fit the handle perfectly. no compalints

Title: Philips Sonicare Elite e7300 Power Toothbrush
Text: I've had this toothbrush for three years and it cleans well. But I have to question the price at $9,999.00. But then again, clean teeth are priceless.Don't forget to floss! (daily)

Title: Crest SpinBrush Multi-Angle, Extra Soft Bristles (Colors May Vary)
Text: Just the top part vibrates; the bottom part of the brush does nothing. Also it just vibrates not rotate or spin. I feel like it does nothing more then give a nice hand massage. It is just like a normal toothbrush, but heavier and eats battery. Not worth even this cheap price.

Title: ACT Anticavity Fluoride Mouthwash, Mint, 18-Ounce Bottles
Text: I like Reach Act Anticavity Fluoride Rinse. The taste is very good. It's not too strong, so I can actually hold it in my mouth for the recommended one minute. With some other mouthwashes that's very hard to do. I really like their measuring system -- it's very convenient. Before, I'd always put mouthwash in the cap. When I screwed it back on, the mouthwash leftovers would drip and make the bottle and sink dirty and sticky. With Reach Act there's no spillage -- plus you get the right amount every time. I'd definitely recommend it to a friend.

Title: Kidkusion Driveway Safety Sign -2 Pack
Text: This product is listed as a "two pack"....people would think that would mean two signs. I would like what I ordered to match th description. Furthermore, only one sign at 14.99 and five dollars shipping is a complete rip off. I wanted two signs for my big drive way and yard. I should get what I ordered.....another sign or a complete refund!!!

Title: Kwik Cabana II
Text: I bought this tent the day before we left for the beach for my 3 1/2 month old. It was so easy to put up, take down, and carry. It provided enough ventilation, and she was comfortable napping in it. It is very light--will blow in the wind. We weighed it down with water bottles in the corners. We couldn't have taken her to the beach without it!!!

Title: Les Trois Petits Cochons Pate - Pat de Campagne (8 ounce)
Text: This pate was the first item to disappear from the hors d'oevres tray I set out at a holiday party. It was the hands-down favorite.

Title: NUK Classic Latex BPA Free Pacifier, 0+ Months, Colors May Vary
Text: These latex (brown material) nuks are our baby's preferred pacifier, and they've become very difficult to find in local stores. It seems everyone is switching over to the clear silicone, but my baby just doesn't like that material. The price is great! The only potential drawback for others might be the assorted colors. I ordered 2 and received a white and a purple, just fine for my baby girl. Love this Nuk and the peace it provides!

Title: Wubbanub Infant Pacifier - Pink Horse
Text: I understand the idea behind this but think there are better products out there. Maybe you will feel differently. I dont recommend.

Title: Mam Love And Affection Size One Silicone Value Pack, Multiple Colors
Text: I think these pacifiers are great; they work either way so at night you don't have to feel around for a notch to make sure they're going in the right direction. They don't leave marks around my baby's mouth like another pacifier did. I believe the company is European, maybe that's why they're not as widespread in the U.S., but they're made well. The attachment is so useful, especially when you're out and about with the baby. Just imagine the horror when the pacifier drops out of the baby's mouth onto the germ-filled floor and there's no bathroom in sight to wash the pacifier.

Title: RaZbaby Keep-it-Kleen Pacifier
Text: This is an adorable product but it does has some down falls. The plastic piece that clasps over the nipple if the product is removed or drop digs into baby's face and leaves red marks also plastic is rather thin and breaks easily. Overall its a cute idea just needs a few adjustments.

Title: Chomp Baby Pacifier
Text: Hilarious! My daughter even spits out other pacifiers to take this one. Gave everyone a good laugh Christmas morning! Nice and cheap too!

Title: Diamond 2 Orthodontic Pacifiers (Colors May Vary)
Text: My son LOVES this pacifier. It was the only pacifier I could get him to take when he was first born. It is 6+ months, but worked for him as a new born.

Title: Skip Hop Pacifier Pocket
Text: It's a nice pouch and holds 1-2 pacifiers. However, the snap keeps coming undone. It's intended to be hooked onto a diaper bag or purse, so it's pretty important that it stays put!

Title: NUK 2 Pack Classic Silicone BPA Free Pacifier, Size 1
Text: I can't compare these pacifiers to others because they're the only kind we've given to our newborn daughter. She takes them and doesn't seem to have a problem with them. I have a few complaints though- they accumulate gunk where the pacifier attaches, water gets inside the pacifier part when we boil them, and they leave marks on my daughter's cheeks. And because they're so tight against her cheeks, her cheeks are red and moist after she spits it out. I'm going to switch to a different product before they give her a rash. Definitely do not get these pacifiers.

Title: Motley Pacifier Chain
Text: I am very excited to have found these products. My mother gave me a couple of these 8 years ago when I had my first baby and she had gotten them in Germany. There wasn't anywhere here that sold anything like that back then, and I received so many compliments on them. I can't wait to hear the same things again when people see the new ones!

Title: Billy Bob Two Front Teeth Baby Pacifier, Pink Lips
Text: I bought this for my son and people LOVE it! I am asked all the time where I bought it from cuz they want to get it for their grandchild, niece, nephew...ect I often think Amazon should pay me for the amount of word of mouth I have given on this product... I think if you have a sense of humor and don't see it as some slam against humanity (as some reviewer has) than you'll love it, I think if you do have a problem with it you probably aren't even bothering looking at the product page and or its reviews.

Title: NUK 2 Pack Classic Silicone BPA Free Pacifier, Size 1
Text: Our son loves it! They gave him at the hospital when he was born and its his favorite pacifier so far!

Title: Wubbanub Infant Pacifier ~ Blue Pony
Text: I had purchased one of these for each of my previous children so i thought i would buy one for my newest addition. Once again i was not disappointed. My son loves it and it goes everywhere with us. It has helped my son sleep in his crib over night, it gives him something to cuddle with. In short I love it!

Title: JJ Cole Essentials Pacifier Pod - Pink Flower
Text: I wish I had this with my first baby. No more lost pacifiers for me.

Title: Wubbanub Infant Plush Toy Pacifier Green Frog
Text: I love this pacifier! I bought the red dog, too (I think that is cuter). Unfortunately I did it before my baby was born and I see now that she is not into pacifier that much (which is not bad either). She uses it occasionally before sleeping.

Title: Billy Bob Two Front Teeth Baby Pacifier, Pink Lips
Text: I bought this pacifier for my nephew in Brazil. My brother in law is a joker and I thought this pacifier would bring lots of fun. It's a great quality material and come with instructions to sanitize before using it, which I think is very important.

Title: Gerber First Essentials 2 Pack Soft Center Latex Pacifier
Text: Took one star off immediately even though I knew I could not pick colors. Amazon could fix this if they wished. I ordered two sets hoping to get one neutral color for my son. I got yellow and pink. The quality is good. I will say we bought these for 2.99 and then saw them in our local Wal Mart for 2.78 in pink, blue, and yellow. Still a good price here you may want to check your local Wal Mart though if you're concerned about colors.

Title: Bottle Tethers
Text: These work pretty well, but could grip a little better. My 20 month old twins are able to slide these off their Avent sippy cups. So, I grabbed my hot glue gun and added a short, squiggly line of glue on the inside of the strip and now the cups don't budge at all. Easy, cheap fix and now these work better than the more expensive SippiGrips!

Title: Billy Bob Two Front Teeth Baby Pacifier, Pink Lips
Text: Bought this for my friends baby and had some good laughs! and it shut him up for a while too!

Title: RaZbaby Keep-it-Kleen Pacifier
Text: This is adorable and my niece's favorite pacifier. Highly recommend. She is teething now and this pacifier has endured all of her chewing!

Title: Gerber First Essentials 2 Pack Soft Center Latex Pacifier
Text: I don't like that you can't pick your colors. I will not give my boy a pink pacifier.

Title: B&M Brown Bread Plain, 16 oz. (Six Cans)
Text: B&M Brown bread totally took us back to our childhood. Slice it into rounds about 3/8 inch thick. The trick is steaming it so that it is hot and moist and serve with butter, which melts into the bread. Looks like chocolate, but it is dark with molasses. They still make the same stuff of our memories. Patience! First can didn't get hot enough or moist enough, but the second and third were perfect.

Title: Old El Paso Stand 'n Stuff Taco Shells, 4.7-Ounce Boxes (Pack of 12)
Text: I no longer use anything else! They break only as easily as any other taco shell. If you fill the bottom with wet stuff like sauce, tomatoes, and cheese they are good to go!

Title: South Beach Diet Whole Wheat Wrap, 10-Count, 8-Inch Wrap (Pack of 6)
Text: I found it hard to find a true 100% whole wheat tortilla that is healthy. This product provides what I'm looking for while tasting good and being big enough to be useful.

Title: Ener-G Foods Yeast-Free Brown Rice Loaf, 19-Ounce Packages (Pack of 6)
Text: To make real bread, one needs yeast and gluten. As a baker, I tried this bread on a whim. It is completely different than the bread I bake or even the garbage that passes as bread in a grocery store. However, if you cannot digest gluten or yeast, this bread is much better than any one could make at home. If one toasts the bread (really toast it to a deep golden color) it is a great vehicle for other flavors and has a nice texture in a sandwich. I cannot stress the importance of toasting enough. Cold and alone, it is bland and dryer than dry, but it has real potential with a little heat, Vegenaise and fresh tomato and basil.

Title: Gourmet Texas Tamales "A la Carte" 4 dozen Spinach Tamales
Text: These are really good tamales. For a really good traditional tamale, I highly recommend the bean tamales from the same company. But if you're in the mood for a more cheesy taste these are great.

Title: Tasty Bite Green Curry Vegetables & Jasmine Rice, 12-Ounce Boxes (Pack of 6)
Text: This green curry is really, really good. The only thing that would make it 5 stars would be a few more vegetables. But the flavor is excellent. Nice and spicy!

Title: Luzianne Jambalaya Dinner Kit, 8-Ounce Boxes (Pack of 6)
Text: My main store, Kroger, doesn't carry this and never did. Winn-Dixie used to carry this, and they closed up! Gah!! I looked high and low and finally found them still being carried at one of the smaller stores called ValuMarket. ValuMarket tends to draw a really culturally diverse crowd, and they still carry the Luzianne dinner kits!! Hallelujah! I only seem to crave the Jambalaya Dinner, but they do have others. There were 4 on the shelf, other day, and I bought all 4 of them! I've been seeing them there, consistantly, for years.Thank goodness for Amazon, though. I will definitely order them, if necessary.

Title: Zatarain's New Orleans Style Mixes, Dirty Rice With Cheese, 8-Ounce Boxes (Pack of 12)
Text: This is a good product and amazon's price is right, but there may be a storage problem at the warehouse. All of the mix in the packets is clumped. It cooks up well enough but takes some work to break the clump apart for cooking.

Title: Zatarain's New Orleans Style Chicken & Rice Dinner, 7.5-Ounce Boxes (Pack of 12)
Text: I've always been a big fan of Zatarain's products, and the Chicken & Rice Dinner is no exception! The combination of spices (and veggies) in the rice add a great flavor to the chicken (prepared via the box's suggested one-pan option or adding cubed chicken in). Even my picky eaters enjoyed it! I recommend this for anyone looking for a nice Cajun kick to their chicken and rice dinners!My only qualm is the quantity. A pack of 12 boxes ended up being split up and given to friends, because it was taking up too much room in my pantry. If only [...] could break it down to 6 boxes/pack.

Title: Spaa Natural Foods Garlic Basil Stir-Fry Noodle Kit, 9.9-Ounce (Pack of 12)
Text: This is my second order of a package of 12. What a wonderful product! I had served it to my daughters, who were visiting, as a relatively quick and easy dinner, using frozen mixed vegetables and shrimp. Everyone was raving, and they plan to buy their own. Good ingredients and superb taste. Your tastebuds will "sing!"

Title: Kraft Noodle with Savory Chicken, 7-Ounce Boxes (Pack of 12)
Text: Just to let you know that Kraft Foods has discontinued making this product. According to them there was not enough demand to continue making the product.

Title: Hormel Reduced Fat Corned Beef Hash, 15-Ounce Units (Pack of 12)
Text: Can corned beef for breakfast is a passion of mine since childhood. I used to spend a lot of time with relatives who lived on the coast with frequent power outages. Thus, canned items were often used and we had canned corn beef almost every Saturday. The reduced fat line has all the flavor of the original, and more healthy for you. I usually broil it crisp, and scramble a egg. Then top with some BBQ sauce.....overall a very good item.

Title: Annie's Homegrown Shells & White Cheddar Macaroni & Cheese, 6-Ounce Boxes (Pack of 12)
Text: I like this when I'm in a hurry and in the mood for mac & cheese, it's tasty and easy to prepare.

Title: Hormel Beef Tamales, In Chili Sauce, 15-Ounce Units (Pack of 12)
Text: whole case of tamales, cheaper that store price, tasty but what they call chili I call water with grease. Drain and add your own chili top with cheese serve on bed of lettuse and supper is ready.

Title: Pataks Mild Curry Paste 10 Oz
Text: This curry paste is great for putting flavor into something simple. I throw a can of diced tomatoes in the crock pot along with some chopped onion and garlic, a few tablespoons of the paste, a little broth and whatever meat I have on hand. Chicken, beef, lamb, it doesn't matter. I come home to a wonderful aroma and after steaming some rice I have a meal that tastes like I've been working on it all day.It is very mild but flavorful. In fact, a friend who absolutely hates spicey food loved this. I actually like spicey food and sometimes mix one tablespoon of the hot along with two tablespoons of the mild. Just depends on my mood and who I'm cooking for.

Title: Annie Chun's Kung Pao Noodle Bowl, 8.6-Ounce Units (Pack of 6)
Text: Let me just say that I had a choice between this meal and saltines and I chose the saltines. At least they don't have that overpowering sweet soy sauce taste. It was an empty meal. The cover gives a false impression of a more hardy, diverse product than that which I discovered when I opened the bland noodle package. It tasted like I was doing myself harm in the consumption of the noodle bowl; like I was dangerously close to my maximum dosage of sodium and sugar. It is cheap and its GREAT that the bowl is biodegradable. But please, make it taste like food and charge more. If I wanted to eat sweetened flour for a low price then I'd eat fast food. I'd rather pay a bit more for a good product.

Title: Viva La Rice Ready to Eat Rice, White Rice with Butter Flavor, 8-Ounce Pouches (Pack of 12)
Text: Obviously microwavable rice won't have the same quality as freshly steamed rice, but this comes close enough for me. It's very convenient for when you're at college and don't want to eat icky campus food. Just microwave this, add some microwavable Indian Food, and you're good to go

Title: Kraft Noodle with Savory Chicken, 7-Ounce Boxes (Pack of 12)
Text: We have searched everywhere for this and can only find it here. Getting ready to order another case of it...

Title: Kraft Organic Macaroni & Cheese Dinner, Cheddar, 6-Ounce Boxes (Pack of 12)
Text: The organic Macaroni and Cheese from Kraft makes fast dinners a snap. I have a 4- and 7-year-old and they love it! I will usually prepare it with plain non-fat Greek yogurt, which adds protein and calcium, and the kids love it more. They even ask for it to be prepared "with the yogurt!" Whatever is left-over, they have no problems eating it in their school lunches the next day. I am happy to be giving them an all-time favorite (that even we loved as kids) in an organic fashion...way to go Kraft for doing that for us and the planet.

Title: Namaste Foods, Gluten Free Say Cheez Pasta Dish, 9-Ounce Bags (Pack of 6)
Text: I thought this would be a good gluten free replacement for Annie's mac n' cheese, but this was not really macaroni and cheese. The sauce was not smooth and was spicy (not hot-spicy, but strong-flavored spicy). My kids were appalled by it and while my husband and I could eat it, we didn't really like it. Since I bought a case, we threw away the rest of the spice packets and made our own cheese blend for the rest of the pasta. I would suggest trying one bag from a local store first if you can, otherwise be aware that you may just be buying expensive pasta with useless spice packets if your family doesn't like this unusual flavor.

Title: Omaha Steaks Potatoes
Text: Despite what some think there is a ton of fillers in here (see the ingredient list on the Omaha site), but.... that is not a bad thing in this case. They are not unhealthy fillers and these are very delicious. Our kids just love them. We serve one ball as a serving as that is the perfect healthy carb portion for a meal. 1 piece has the following nutrition just in case you are wondering:Calories

Title: A Taste of China Sweet and Sour Rice, 6-Ounces (Pack of 6)
Text: I just happened to pick up some of this rice from the christmas tree shop a few weeks ago. It really is the best chinese rice outside of a restaurant. Needless to say, I was really bummed when it has been currently not available for some time now on amazon.com. I have checked all of our local grocery stores and no one carries this item, so I went back to the christmas tree shop and purchased all 12 of them that they had left. Amazon, please make this rice available again. It really is the greatest and also super easy to make.

Title: Annie Chun's Kimchi Soup Noodle Bowl, 5.9-Ounce Bowls (Pack of 6)
Text: Thid is excellent and easy to make instant soup. I live down the street from a Korean restaurant and their soup is very similar but I like this better with the Udon noodles. Not the cheapest instant soup but very good. The only complaint is the coupons on boxes are expired, the soup is fine till 2013. I hope Annie fixes that problem as a dollar off coupon is good if it isn't expired.

Title: Annie's Homegrown Curly Fettuccine with White Cheddar & Broccoli Sauce, 7.25-Ounce Boxes (Pack of 6)
Text: The box says, you don't have to admit that it comes from a box because it is so tasty. I had guests over and they raved about it. I'm just glad that all Annie's pasta are easy to make and taste great. Haven't had a version that I didn't like.

Title: Thermalon Microwave Activated Moist Heat Therapy Wrap with Ties for Back, Hip, Shoulder, 7" x 12"
Text: Wonderful, wonderful! Best thing I ever bought!! I have the tie on version and the rectangle version and I love them both. Stay hot for hours. Very sturdy and well made. Couldn't be happier with it. I use one or both every day on my back and it helps me tremendously. Can be used for cold too but I have not tried that.

Title: Schiff Joint Free Plus Powder w/ Glucosamine Chondroitin MSM & Collagen - 13.48 Oounces (382.2 grams)
Text: We've been using this glucosamine powder in our protien drinks every morning for several years now. I was dubious about it at first but it's the only thing to which I can attribute the lessening of aching in my joints.It has the recommended other ingredients that should be taken along with glucosamine which many supplements don't.

Title: Salonpas Pain Relieving Patch - 120 Patches
Text: I've used prescription patches and these patches. These have worked far better for me -- especially because they fit better on my neck and don't fall off.

Title: Sunbeam Health at Home King Size Heating Pad with HeatSense Technology, Grey
Text: Excellent heating pad. Doesn't scrunch up like others do and the thermostat actually works like it should. Recommended

Title: Fashy Zebra Plushie Hot Water Bottle - Made in Germany
Text: A very nice high-quality product. I was replacing a fleece bear-shaped bottle cover which seemed to be a bit softer. The bottle in this one seems like it will outlast me. Good product.

Title: Chillow Comfort Device
Text: Love the Chillow...having night hot flashes makes sleep difficult, but the chillow will cool you down quickly and lets you sleep without overheating. At first it feels pretty cold, but you quickly appreciate how it cools you down. I put some white vinegar in it along w/the water since we have well water to avoid any mold growth. I check the plug every night to make sure it is sealed well, so far no leakage. Would recommend to anyone that has hot flash/night sweat issues.

Title: Chillow Comfort Device
Text: Absolute waste of money, this is not a Pillow as advertised, in my opinion falsely, but a flat mat which, when filled with water is a very heavy weight and it is not possible to sleep on this. You could use it to wipe your feet on but thats all. An extremely disappointed customer who suffers from overheating badly in bed and thought this was a great solution. Now out of pocket and no better off.

Title: The Happy Company Microwaveable Therapeutic Neck Wrap, Blue
Text: The pocket to hold an herb sachet isn't an added feature... it's a necessity... because the smell of the buckwheat is otherwise overwhelming... and entirely unpleasant... ESPECIALLY when you're already experiencing discomfort in the shoulder or neck! It isn't that the wrap doesn't heat well or offer relief... it's just that the odor of the buckwheat is not tolerable. Discarded.

Title: Elasto-Gel Hot/Cold Knee Wrap Large/X-Large #KW6005 - Elasto Gel
Text: I had minor knee surgery a couple years back and have had slight discomfort in my knee ever since. especially after a long workout. Filling and ice pack, sitting in one place, and holding it against my knee for at least 30 minutes several times a week seemed unconventional. This knee wrap made the process so much easier. I simply leave it in my freezer and when needed, i wrap it around my knee. I don't need to be sitting in one place either with my hands tied holding it in place. My only complaint is with the material inside the wrap. It seems to shift around too easily deforming the shape of the wrap. Other than that, I'm very pleased with the product.

Title: Sunbeam 732-500 King Size Heating Pad with UltraHeatTechnology
Text: This heating pad doesn't get hot enough. I would return it if I could. It's very hard to get a good heating pad on-line. What can one do about it? The product is the Sunbeam Health at Home Easy To Use King Size Moist/Dry Heating Pad, Blue.

Title: Sunbeam 732-500 King Size Heating Pad with UltraHeatTechnology
Text: This large size heating pad is very satisfying. The price is very reasonable. I only wish the cord that is attached to the pad itself was not so stiff. But I would recommend this heating pad and would purchase another if needed.

Title: Sleep Right Secure Comfort Dental Guard
Text: This sleepguard is made from fine material and seems like it would last a good long time. However if you are an adult male over about 175 its going to be way too small for you. I think its the right size for most women and teens. IMO.

Title: Cold Pack - ColPaC Brand - Blue Vinyl - Half Size - 7.5" x 11"
Text: Great cooling pack. The 7.5" x 11" is a perfect size for my knee. It is very easy to form into perfect shape. This pack does NOT get too cold but it is perfect temperature when putting directly on the skin. I keep it in a ziploc bag when putting it into the freezer to prevent damage from it (thanks to recommendations from Amazon reviewers). I always cool my knee after working out and that prevents inflamation from happening and keeps my arthritis under control. Great cooling pack. I bought one for my mother as well for her knee.

Title: Herbal Concepts Hot/Cold Herbal Fan Shoulder Wrap
Text: The wrap is partially-filled and the baffling is poor, meaning that you can shake down the seeds to one side and have empty fabric for OVER HALF of the length of the wrap. Since the seeds carry the heat/cold, I end up having to constantly readjust and fold it over. I am sewing the ends and the neckline to try and keep the seeds together. If I had been able to see it first, I would not have purchased it.

Title: Quantum Research Canker Cover Oral Canker Sore Patch
Text: My Husband gets a sore about twice a month. It is very painful and makes the man very very grumpy. For the sake of the family, I made many trips to the pharmacy to find a cure. At last, I found a single packet of this at CVS and we are all much happier. As other reviews have said, it is not pretty; the patch puffs up a lot and looks a bit like a chew. However it lasts for a long time and there is no medicinal taste. I have used the patch myself and would highly recommend it. I have not tried any other similar product because this product fits all my criteria.

Title: Carex Bed Buddy
Text: I have one of these already and bought this one as a gift. It is absolutely heaven. Warm it up in the micro and you're good to go. The shape is what makes it so great. It is like wearing a cape. It fits perfectly and stays in place.

Title: Cystex Antibacterial & Analgesic Urinary Pain Relief Tablets, 100CT
Text: I cant speak to Cystex's ability to prevent UTIs, as I dont use it as a preventitive (which is why i only gave it 4 stars-maybe that wasnt fair, but, oh well), but when you need really fast relief of UTI symptoms, definately go with this product! Azo cranberry is great as a preventative measure, and that is what I use to prevent infections. But when I stop taking it for a long time, and get a UTI, Azo's pain reliever does not relieve the pain as quickly as Cystex does. It works really really fast! I cant remember exactly how long it took, but it was definately somewhere around 20 minutes.

Title: Softheat Softheat Heating Pad Moist Or Dry King Size
Text: Bought this product at a store. It did not work and the store will not take it back. This is a horrible product avoid at all cost!

Title: Trigosamine Jointcare Supplement, Maximum Strength Caplets, 90-Count Bottle "Now with Vitamin-D"
Text: I had been taking Trigosamine , purchased from a different source, for several months before I ordered from you. I was very happy with it after about six weeks and continue to be. I ordered from you because of your reputation and lower cost.

Title: Sunbeam Health at Home HeatFlex Stingray Shaped Heating Pad with 4 Heat Settings and 2 Hour Auto-Off, Grey
Text: This little sucker gets so hot. It's small and thin, but i really love this heating pad! The shape of it is great and it gets really hot, i don't think i've ever even put it on "hot" yet. lol

Title: Seventh Generation Trash Bags, Pack of 12, Packaging May Vary
Text: These are garbage bags. They are the perfect sized for our kitchen simplehuman 30 liter can. Yes, the 30 _gallon_ bags are perfect for the 30 _liter_ can. The smaller, white "tall kitchen bags" that Seven gen has were too small for it.They come with twist ties. Have a good place to store the 12 boxes.

Title: Kleenex Soft Pack White Tissues, 2 Ply - 45 ea
Text: I thought I was buying a package of the little kleenex for the car. I never would have bought this otherwise.

Title: Green Forest Luncheon Napkins White
Text: These napkins are very soft and absorbent for the price. Our family goes through a lot of napkins, so I don't like to spend a lot. These totally fit the bill!

Title: Hefty EZ Flaps Tall, 13 Gallon Kitchen Bags, 80 Count Boxes (Pack of 6)
Text: I'm not sure why people are so passionate about garbage bags. These work. They are bags. They hold stuff...... I don't like to fill a bag to the brim if it means stinking up the kitchen for a week. I wanted cheap bags and that's what I got.... I'm happy. They lose a star for being a hair thinner than I'd like and having too big a box, more bags or less box people.... That's it, I hope you enjoyed reading about garbage bags :)

Title: Fit & Fresh Lunch On The Go
Text: There are lots of lunch boxes out there, and all I needed was something simple that it won't matter if I stain or otherwise destroy through repeated use. Highly recommend if you are trying to keep something fresh for the day and aren't trying to impress anyone. A teenager might not care for it much for the same reasons I really like it.

Title: Seventh Generation Bathroom Tissue, 1-Ply Sheets, 1000 Sheet Roll (Pack of 48)
Text: Demanding Defecators look no further...your seal of approval will sit mightily upon this heap.Seventh Generation toilet tissue provides one with just the right amount of wiping power for those solid soiled messes that toilet paper was designed to wipe. *dare u to discsuss this subject in an inoffensive to the amazon.com gods sensabilities*It has just the right amount of scratchiness to discourage handfuls of pleasure by toddlers as well as teenage girls needing a little makeup removal. *tp consumption in the household has reduced dramatically since it is no longer used for makeup removal, extra padding, kleenex, and whatever else it is that toddlers seem to find to do with a roll in 5 minutes*It is one ply and will save the "head plunger of the home" from having to plunge after every flush with the only use a gallon or less of water toilets.*that is me and I am enjoying the break, but it still handles those...particularly odiforous pungent deposits without leaving any tell tale reminders in ones garments*It has just the right amount of absorbancy for the more frontal wiping needs. *blinks*A case of TP lasts about 2 months in a household with 4 bathrooms and twice as many people.I would recommend the purchase, you are saving the environment, you are reducing fossil fuels by having it delivered, the wrapping paper that 7th generation comes in composts quickly in the heap; the cardboard box is just the right size for raised bed veggie gardening and by end of season will be sufficently deteriorated to be turned over and tossed in a new box for the following season.Ok that is about as much as I can say without using the word....or... or...or...or....So for the Deamanding Defecator I say look no further for your defecation wiping needs 7th gen will make u squat with pride!Amazon.com sent me an email requesting a review of this product...after staring like a deer in the headlights for a few I thought what the heck I am great when it comes to shoveling the......

Title: Reflections Heavyweight "Looks Like Silver" Disposable Flatware for 40 with BONUS Pack of 40 Forks - 160 Pieces in All
Text: This product was a great hit at my wedding reception. I was pleased when I opened the package! I definately will use this product again in the near future, as I do put on events occasionally. The products was nearly flawless, sturdy & did not look cheap. Most people thought they had regular silverware until they picked it up.

Title: Ziploc Storage Bags
Text: This bag is just a large version of average zip top bag. Good quality plastic. I use them for brining and marinading larger amounts of meat or vegetables. They also work well for storing large amounts of cleaned and cut greens in the refrigerator until ready to use.

Title: Charmin Bathroom Tissue Plus a Touch of Lotion with Aloe, 8 Giant Rolls (Pack of 5)
Text: Product is very soft. But not as strong as I had hoped. Would reccommend, though.

Title: Hefty Gripper Tall, 13 Gallon Kitchen Bags, Case Pack, Six - 40 Count Boxes (240 Bags)
Text: Hefty Gripper Bags do just what they are designed to do and they do it very well. We own a bullet-style trashcan that is smooth and these are the only bags that do not slide down inside it. That holds true even when you lift the lid off of the can. Great product.

Title: Seventh Generation Trash Bags, Pack of 12, Packaging May Vary
Text: Cheap bags, about a quarter of them can't be used due to holes in them right out of the box.

Title: Scott Rapid-Dissolving Bathroom Tissue, 1-Ply, Unscented, Case Pack, Five 4 Roll Packs, 800 Sheets Each (20 Rolls)
Text: It's not super cushiony-soft, but if you're concerned about your septic system, this TP is an excellent choice. Not super scratchy, like some of the recycled brands, either.

Title: Tempo Black Leather Car Visor Tissue Holder with 20 Tissues
Text: This is a great product! Everyone knows you always need a tissue when they are never there - and this solves the problem.Included in the box was the black leather tissue holder, 2 packs of 25 tissues and 2 purse/pocket packs of tissues. The case holds 1 - 25 pack of tissues and dispenses them with ease. I have mine clipped on the driver's side visor and it does not hinder driving or get in the way at all. The visor is still able to be put down and moved around, without needing to remove the tissue holder.The tissues themselves are not as soft as "brand name with lotion' but they are soft and thick. Very durable. (even used them to wipe up pop spilled by kids in the back seat) This is a great deal for any vehicle to keep tissues in reach.

Title: Green Forest Unscented Bathroom Tissue, 100% Recycled Paper, Whitened Without Chlorine, 12 Roll Packs (Pack of 8)
Text: THE ROLLS MAY BE SMALL BUT IT IS SOFTER THAN MOST BRANDS THAT I HAVE TRIED. GUESTSDONT'T SEEM TO TO NOTICE THE DIFFERENCE. I LIKE IT.

Title: Kleenex Facial Tissue With Lotion, 3-Ply Tissues, 3 Packs, 130 Tissues Each (Pack of 12)
Text: I have problems with every other tissue on the market giving off, what can best be described as tissue dust, they all shed, and make my eyes water, the lotion in this Kleenex product prevents that from happening, I wouldn't ever be without it, if you have allergic reactions to tissue's try this one, I think you will be glad you did.

Title: Kleenex Ultra Soft White Tissues, 3-Ply - 180 ct
Text: I really liked this product a lot. They work great for keeping the nose from becoming sore and they're really strong as well. The Cold Care Ultra product is even better than the lotion type. It worked just as well to prevent my nose from getting sore. And you don't have to worry if you used them on the fly to wipe your glasses clean. Definitely switching to these. I give them a high 5 stars.

Title: Glad SimplyCooking OvenWare 9x12, 2-Count Packages (Pack of 6)
Text: Yes, these seem to have disappeared from the stores. Drove 65 miles on way last week to find them in a small town store. Glad to have found them here. When my son was deployed 4 years ago, I sent a package every three weeks. One of these was in each box. I would bake a favorite bar recipe in this pan, let it cool, take it out of the pan and wrap with plastic wrap. Wash the pan and put the wrapped bake goods back into the pan and cover. Wonderful for mailing. They fit perfectly in a med flat rate box, you just have to bend the tab some or cut it off. Slide in a few packs of nuts or something else and you're good to go. If I send a cake, I send it unfrosted in the pan and send a container of frosting on the side. Now, he is back there and the packages have already started to flow. Thanks for a great product.

Title: Seventh Generation Lunch Napkin, White Color, 1-ply, 250-Count Packs (Pack of 12)
Text: These are great to use. They are very sturdy and very attractive looking. I highly recommend them.

Title: Glad SimplyCooking OvenWare 9x12, 2-Count Packages (Pack of 6)
Text: I bought these for bulk cooking. They work great. They store great in the freezer and can go straight into the oven. Just don't cook the lid with the pan. Would definitely recommend to someone looking to purchase.

Title: Seventh Generation Bathroom Tissue, 2-Ply Sheets, 500-Sheet Rolls (Pack of 48)
Text: This product changed my life. The comfort, the pleasure, the attention to detail. This is not toilet paper. This is God's gift to anuses everywhere. I love you.

Title: Clif Mojo Bars - 12 Pack
Text: XLNT product, but Amazon has just bumped the price up by $5 a box. (currently $17.95)...thats $1.12 per bar. Out of my price range :(The last time I ordered these a few months ago, all flavors were $12.95/box.

Title: Clif Shot Bloks Organic Energy Chews, 2.1-Ounce Packets
Text: This is exactly what I wanted and at a great price. I first purchased Shot Bloks at Target but at a price of $1.99 each so this is a bargain. Thanks.

Title: Clif Shot Bloks Organic Energy Chews, 2.1-Ounce Packets
Text: I take these on long runs. I typically don't eat before I go. The blocks curb the hunger, boost, the energy, and most of all don't create the need for a potty break.It's sweet and chewy. If you're running in heat, they get gooey. You might need to take two bites of each bite since they take some time to chew up and they occupy alot of space in your mouth.

Title: Nong Shim - Sweet Potato Snack 1.93 Oz.
Text: These nong shim sweet potato snacks hit the spot. I loved the crunch and they weren't overly sweet or overly spicy- just the perfect mix!

Title: Clif Shot Bloks Organic Energy Chews, 2.1-Ounce Packets
Text: I never go on a long run without stashing some of these with my water. I prefer them cold and hardened which make them my preferred winter running refreshment. Cran-Raz is my favorte, but I also like the Strawberry. I don't care at all for the ones that contain caffine - they have a funny aftertaste.If you're going out for a run and want an alternative to GU/AccelGel/Power Gel, etc. definitely give these a try. They also work great for biking and hiking.

Title: 4 - 30 oz. Containers of Utz Pub Mix
Text: I found this mix at the Ft Myer Commissary. I looked for this product last time I visited the commissary and could not find it. So here I am online looking and found it here. I could eat this all day. I've tried several different snack mixes, but most have too many pretzels. This has a very nice balance of flavors and textures -- and not a lot of pretzels. I'm stocking up!!

Title: Clif Shot Bloks Organic Energy Chews, 2.1-Ounce Packets
Text: After struggling with my gag reflex and versions of gu, I went to shot bloks and have never looked back! I love them. I've consumed them while mountain climbing and running long distances. When I'm super exhausted my appetite wanes, but I'm always able to eat a couple of these to keep me going when nothing else sounds appetizing. I also have to hand it to Clif for making the packaging convenient - it's easy to keep on the move and eat these.

Title: Kasugai - Roasted Wasabi Hot Green Peas (4.3 Oz - 1 Lb)
