Why take a chance on something newer hen this is so wonderful? I also love it is not one of those overpowering, cloying, gagging perfumes that pass by me most days.

Title: Comptoir Sud Pacifique Coco Extreme
Text: this perfume is amazing, when i wear it people say it smells like anything from warm cotton candy to cookies. it's delicious but not overpoweringly sweet.i just wouldn't buy it from this co, 99 perfume. i ordered it and it took a week after it was supposed to arrive and two emails to customer service for someone to finally respond and let me know it was damaged and sent back and now it's out of stock. how odd! it still says in stock!buyer beware! it may be a good price but deal with a company you know and trust even if you have to pay full price!

Title: Lovely Eau de Parfum for Women by Sarah Jessica Parker
Text: I bought this as a gift for a picky friend and she could not have been more delighted. She hadn't smelled it before but loved it's complexity without being heavy. I may have to get some for myself. *grin*

Title: Curious By Britney Spears for Women Eau De Parfum Spray
Text: I purchased this for my 14 yr old niece and of course had to smell it out of 'curiousity' and actually ended getting some for myself.

Title: Euphoria Perfume For Women by Calvin Klein
Text: Euphoria by CK. The fragrance of this perfume is truly euphoric! A mix of Pomegranate, Black Orchid, Lotus Blossom, and Liquid Amber, this fragrance turns woody as the day passes. I've got compliments during the day whenever I am wearing this perfume.The fragrance is confident and sexy. A must have!

Title: MACKIE For Women By BOB MACKIE Eau De Toilette Spray
Text: Wonderful scent - way better price than at the stores. Recommended to two other Mackie users

Title: Escape by Calvin Klein for Women
Text: My husand bought me this for Xmas. I have to say I would never have chosen this myself, but wore it as he loves it. I cannot believe the reaction I get from MEN while wearing this, it's incredible! I work with men and women and the men go crazy and always tell me I smell so good while the women never say a thing! Maybe this just appeals to a man's sense of smell,or maybe it just suits my body chemistry as I know perfume smells different on everyone. Either way, I will purchasing again!

Title: Luna Bars, 1.69-Ounce Bars
Text: The calories and fat are far less than a candy bar, and it's far more satisfying. I don't get nearly enough vitamins, and these bars give me a better start. There's no corn syrup, plenty of protein, and so many vitamins I found a few I didn't recognize.Amazon has a great price for 15 bars, less than a dollar a piece! Don't be afraid to try these! The Peppermint Stick bars taste just like thin mint Girl Scout Cookies! I like Caramel Nut Brownie too, in fact, the only one that didn't fit my tastes was the Lemon Zest.They're fit for a lady's health, but I'm very sure anyone can enjoy these.

Title: Enzymatic Therapy - Am/Pm Perimenopause Formula, 1 kit [Health and Beauty]
Text: Worth every penny! I started taking this product (one in the morning, one in the evening -- different formulas) in an attempt to find SOMETHING that would help with the symptoms of perimenopause

Title: Source Naturals Progesterone Cream
Text: I have tried several different progesterone creams and this is my favorite. I love the feel of the cream and especially the rosemary scent. I've tried more expensive and well-known brands and have not had the success I have had with this one. One of the more expensive brands made me break out in a rash. So I'm not buying this because it is cheaper; it's just better! I sleep better and feel calmer.

Title: Luna Bars, 1.69-Ounce Bars
Text: Chai tea is the blue ribbon of my luna experience. Not too sweet, yet exotic and full bodied. Lightly coated with yogurt, there are little bits of tea leaves inside. Perfect mid-morning snack.

Title: Luna Bars, 1.69-Ounce Bars
Text: I like the texture and the flavor of this lemon bar. I especially enjoy it with a cup of tea.

Title: Monistat 1 Vaginal Antifungal Combination Pack
Text: I ALMOST didn't try this because of the awful reviews that I had read

Title: FertilAid for Women
Text: I started taking this product about one month ago, So far I have not gotten pregnant but my period is regular again just after a few weeks of taking it. I will probably buy another bottle to see if it actually helps to get pregnant and not just regulate my period.

Title: Covaxil Laboratories Estrin-D, 90 Capsules
Text: I've been using the product for the past year or so now and it really works well for me. I can only speak for myself---it helps me with energy and appetite control---what more can I ask for in help with my weight loss attempts.Covaxil Laboratories Estrin-D, 90 Capsules

Title: Luna Bars, 1.69-Ounce Bars
Text: Luna Bars, Caramel Nut Brownie, 1.69-Ounce Bars (Pack of 15)They were purchased for my 21 year old daughter who loves them and says they helped her finish in the top third of a half-marathon in NY.

Title: Lydia Pinkham Lydia Pinkham Herbal Liquid Supplement
Text: ALL OTHER PRODUCTS I USED DID NOT WORK. THIS PRODUCT HAS STOPPED MY NIGHT SWEATS & GIVEN ME MY SLEEP BACK.

Title: Emerita (Pro-Gest) Pro-gest Cream
Text: Wow! This stuff is a miracle! I feel like I have my life back! And I do! I will always have this stuff in my possession and keep using it until the time I finally go thru menopause!If my writing a review here helps just one other person, it's all worth it!After all, it was thru someone else's post like this on amazon, about a similar product (different brand name) that I found my cure! I can't thank her enough for writing her review on here!This natural cream was a simple solution to severe, heavy, non-stop bleeding that went on for months at a time without stopping! My obgyn doctors office when I called, said well if you're bleeding longer than 90 days, call back and we'll see you. Otherwise, you are having peri-menopause bleeding. (and what the heck was perimenopause anyway? I was 47 years old at the time this started, and I had never heard of it!) So I wasn't happy with that answer (I was on 51 days of non stop bleeding at this point and losing my mind, was so tired and tired of bleeding). Called another obgyn and was told the same thing on the phone, if it's longer than 90 days to call back and they would make me an appointment! I thought they were both nuts!The bleeding finally stopped, on day 88....I had 6 days off and my period started up again! Then it lasted for another 4 months, non stop! Times of super heavy clots big as your palm of your hand (sorry for being so to the point, but it's true!) and incredibly forceful heavy bleeding that kept me inside my home unable to go out and having to break appointments, lunch dates, etc. and turned an outgoing girl into a home hermit! Sometimes at night it was so bad I was up all night in the bathroom passing huge clots and having heavy bleeding that would not let me sleep. Thank God I work mostly from home and could be home during this whole thing that went on, though I did alot of rearranging of my work schedule. And I didn't want to tell anyone, I was too embarrassed to talk about it.Let me tell you, I have gone thru a year and a half of this crazy bleeding and even became iron deficient (I am taking iron daily now) and I am an active, athletic girl! Using this natural progesterone cream has stopped the heavy bleeding and now I am back on regular 28 day cycles! And the clots are gone! The heavy bleeding is gone!I have my period now for about 6 days and it goes away like it should. Took me 4 months of using this cream however to get back to that cycle, so if at first this doesn't work for you then don't give up on it!!! You have to stick with it and give it a chance to rectify things that are out of balance in your body.I am estrogen dominant and found out thru a saliva test at a local health food store. (I had however, already started to use this cream). And I also found that you can't start missing the morning or evening application (I am putting it on twice a day still and I'm on month 7 now of using it) to keep the progesterone in your body balanced or your levels will drop and your period will then arrive.If you are having bleeding issues, I urge you to give this a try. I am so happy I found these amazon reviews thru an internet search on my problem and decided to try this cream. I first bought it at my local natural health food store, but now I buy this one on amazon all the time as it saves me money and it arrives at my doorstep. Suggested reading

Title: Source Naturals Progesterone Cream
Text: I've applied Source Naturals Natural Progesterone Cream for 3 weeks and so far, so good! My hot-flashes seem to have diminished, greatly. With continued use, (as instructed) I expect even better results!

Title: THREELAC Probiotic, 60 Packets
Text: I used this product for a few months and at first I was feeling really good, but after the month wore off I had to take more and more and it seemed like a constant expensive circleI did take the advice of one of your reviewers and went to the health food store and bought a good probiotic and that made a world of difference and I did save a lot of money and got much better results

Title: Source Naturals Progesterone Cream
Text: Although some people found this cream to work wonders, it didn't work for me. I started out with Emerita brand and it changed my life, I had more energy, slept better, had better memory, all sorts of things. I had purchased that at a health food store. I saw the Source Naturals on Amazon at a much better price and decided to try it. I do like that it's in a pot and it does have a nice smell but ever since I switched I've been feeling worse and worse. I don't know if it's the quality of ingredients or if it's the fact that Emerita comes from yam and Source Naturals comes from soy, or if there's another reason I haven't even guessed at. Everyone is different so if one cream doesn't work, try another. Going back to Emerita!

Title: Luna Bars, 1.69-Ounce Bars
Text: Our daughter swears by them. When she needs a quick lift between classes at college, during a study session, or can't get to a meal yet, she grabs a luna bar. As she is a chocoholic, any of them with chocolate will do, but she really likes the chocolate pecan.

Title: Emerita (Pro-Gest) Pro-gest Cream
Text: I purchased this product to help with peri-menopause symtoms- I am 45- as well as symtoms from fibroids. I have used it two months and found that it has helped with breakouts and a few other symtoms. I will continue to use it as most research I have done says it takes about 4-6 months to really see a difference. I have tried other brands in the past and this one is working more quickly than the others.

Title: Mega Food - Women's One Daily
Text: I always had problems with multivitamins affecting my stomach and making me sick. I started this formula about 6 years ago and still love them. They give me energy and make me feel awesome and I when I don't take them i really notice a difference. Everything in them is organic and they actually go through a cold fusion process as opposed to other methods of traditional vitamin making. ALl of the ingredients are frozen while the vitamin is made to ensure we receive as much of the nutritional value as possible. Other brands will typically heat the ingredients during the process and some nutrients are lost. I'm a fan and believe me I am super picky so enjoy!!

Title: New Chapter Estrotone
Text: The product started to work after a week because it needs to build up in your system. All pre-menopause systems are less severe but, most of all mood swings are control and night sweats. This product works well for my body type but, no all products are one size fits all. I do recommend because, it was not a waist of money for me or time spend searching for a product to help me with pre-menophause.

Title: New Chapter Estrotone
Text: I've been taking this product for over a month now. It was recommended to me to get my homones in balance. I just stopped taking birth control about a year ago after seventeen years and my acne has gone mad! I can't tell if this is helping or not but I'm going to continue to take it and see if it makes a difference.

Title: Enzymatic Therapy Remifemin
Text: This is the only product so far I have tried that actually decreased my hot flashes. I was not able to get much sleep because at night they were worse. Remifemin worked after just a couple weeks. It decreased my hot flashes significantly. Also with Amazons subsription it is cheaper than Walmarts prices. I did not try the Nightime one because this one worked so well. Great product and great price.

Title: 3515XP Mosquito Yo-Yo Assorted
Text: Pros

Title: Yomega Mania DVD- 150 Tricks
Text: My son loves to yoyo and he easily mastered every trick in his trick book. I think he needs something more advanced, Like this! Being able to watch the trick in action really helps him.
